title: PreDecisionDenialReceipt
description: Receipt emitted when the admissibility interrogation chain halts before a DecisionRecord is formed.

run_id.description: Unique identifier for this interrogation run.

scenario.description: The scenario name used for this run.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of the interrogation run.

result.description: PASS: all questions satisfied, DecisionRecord formation permitted. PRE_DECISION_DENIAL: chain halted, no DecisionRecord created.

decision_record_created.description: Must be false when result is PRE_DECISION_DENIAL.

halt_at_question.description: Question number at which the chain halted. Null if all questions were satisfied.

evaluations.description: Ordered list of question evaluations. Stops at the first UNSATISFIED.

sha256.description: SHA256 hash of the receipt content (excluding this field) for integrity verification.
